goals: Implement budget feature with flexible scope, per-currency tracking, auto-rolling periods, local notifications, and budget-aware transaction entry.

tasks.title: Dependencies & Schema Update
acceptanceCriteria: Add flutter_local_notifications to pubspec.yaml
Update Budgets table schema in tables.dart to include scopeType, categoryIds, currency, isRecurring, notified75, notified90, notified100
Implement Migration v4 in database.dart
Verify Drift database builds successfully

tasks.title: Transaction DAO Updates
acceptanceCriteria: Add sumExpensesByCurrency method to TransactionDao
Add sumExpensesByCurrencyAndCategories method
Add sumExpensesByCurrencyExcludingCategories method

tasks.title: Budget Period Calculator
acceptanceCriteria: Create BudgetPeriodCalculator utility class
Implement currentPeriod() logic, respecting 14-day rule for fortnightly
Implement pastPeriods() and isExpired()
Add unit tests for the calculator logic

tasks.title: State Management & Providers
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor BudgetProgress model to include currency, isExpired, and category names
Update budgetProgressListProvider to use new scope logic and evaluate notification thresholds
Create activeBudgetWarningsProvider
Create budgetHistoryProvider

tasks.title: Notification Service Setup
acceptanceCriteria: Set up flutter_local_notifications plugin
Configure budget_alerts channel
Wire up notification triggering logic from budgetProgressListProvider

tasks.title: Budget Bottom Sheet (Create/Edit)
acceptanceCriteria: Create BudgetBottomSheet UI with flexible scope selector (All, Include, Exclude)
Add currency, amount, period type, and date pickers
Wire up save logic to BudgetDao
Update BudgetsScreen FAB to open bottom sheet

tasks.title: Budget Details & History UI
acceptanceCriteria: Update BudgetDetailScreen with edit and delete functionality
Add 'View History' button for recurring budgets
Create BudgetHistoryScreen with scrollable list of past periods

tasks.title: Budget-aware Transaction Entry
acceptanceCriteria: Update TransactionBottomSheet to consume activeBudgetWarningsProvider
Display inline warning when matching budget is >=90% used
